info.title: Communal Platform API
info.description: API documentation for the Communal platform.

get.summary: List all digital member card delivery activities

parameters.name: filter[member_id]
parameters.description: Filter activities by the member ID belonging to the related user. Accepts alphanumeric strings.

parameters.name: filter[request_hash]
parameters.description: Filter activities by the unique request hash for tracing API requests.

parameters.name: filter[date_from]
parameters.description: Return activities created on or after the provided date. Format: ISO 8601 date/datetime (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS).

parameters.name: filter[date_to]
parameters.description: Return activities created on or before the provided date. Format: ISO 8601 date/datetime (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS).

parameters.name: filter[status]
parameters.description: Filter activities by delivery status. Supported values: `success`, `failed`.

get.summary: Get export configuration for the current model

parameters.name: filter[attendance_sheet_id]
parameters.description: Filter by attendance sheet ID.

parameters.name: filter[export]
parameters.description: When true, request a CSV export.

parameters.name: filter[export_email]
parameters.description: Email to receive export notification/download link.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include related resources (comma-separated). Options: attendanceSheet, programSignup.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include related resources (comma-separated). Options: attendanceSheet, programSignup.

get.summary: Export attendance sheets as a single XLSX workbook

parameters.name: filter[registration_opportunity_id]
parameters.description: Filter by registration opportunity ID.

parameters.name: filter[parent_program_id]
parameters.description: Filter by parent program ID.

parameters.name: filter[date]
parameters.description: Filter by date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include related resources (comma-separated). Options: registrationOpportunities, records, records.programSignup.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include related resources (comma-separated). Options: registrationOpportunities, records, records.programSignup.

post.description:
Sends a membership card via the email on file for the user. This method allows
configuration of which card types to send.

This endpoint can also be used to create
and update user specific data that will be used to generate the card. If an email supplied
is not found, a new user will be created with the additional data supplied.
post.summary: Send a membership card for a user
Archive or unarchive a membership type
Reorder items by an ordered array of IDs
Disable manual ordering and return to natural ordering

get.summary: List all membership types in the system

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of programs. Registration opportunities (sessions) are
excluded by default for performance - use `?include=programs` to include them.

Returns detailed information about a specific program including
all configuration fields. Use `?include=programs` to include registration
opportunities (sessions) with pricing information.

parameters.name: filter[program_id]
parameters.description: Filter by program ID. Supports comma-separated values for multiple programs.

parameters.name: filter[program[parent_program_id]]
parameters.description: Filter by parent program ID. Returns signups for all child programs under this parent.

parameters.name: filter[user_id]
parameters.description: Filter by user ID. Non-managers can only filter to their own ID.

parameters.name: filter[query]
parameters.description: Search by program name, user name, user email, guest name, additional member name, or guest email.

parameters.name: filter[status]
parameters.description: Filter by program time status. Supports multiple comma-separated values. Options: ongoing, upcoming, past.

parameters.name: filter[timeScope]
parameters.description: Simple time scope filter. Options: upcoming (includes ongoing and active), past, all.

parameters.name: filter[event_start_date]
parameters.description: Filter by program event date range. Pass as array: filter[event_start_date][0]=start&filter[event_start_date][1]=end. Includes ongoing programs.

parameters.name: filter[upcoming]
parameters.description: Filter to signups for upcoming programs only.

parameters.name: filter[past]
parameters.description: Filter to signups for past programs only.

parameters.name: filter[ongoing]
parameters.description: Filter to signups for ongoing programs only.

parameters.name: filter[withTrashed]
parameters.description: Include soft-deleted signups. Defaults to excluding deleted.

parameters.name: filter[program[archived_at]]
parameters.description: Filter by program archived status. Pass empty string to exclude archived programs.

parameters.name: filter[program[deleted_at]]
parameters.description: Filter by program deleted status. Pass empty string to exclude deleted programs.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include related resources (comma-separated). Options: additionalMember, additionalMember.emergency, files, guest, program, program.parentProgram, transaction, user, user.family, user.family.emergency, formSubmissions, subscriptionSchedule.config.configurable, subscriptionSchedule.paymentsReceived, attendanceRecords.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include related resources (comma-separated). Options: additionalMember, additionalMember.emergency, files, guest, program, program.parentProgram, transaction, user, user.family, user.family.emergency, formSubmissions, subscriptionSchedule.config.configurable, subscriptionSchedule.paymentsReceived, attendanceRecords.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of registration opportunities (programs) with optional filtering.

parameters.name: filter[parent_program_id]
parameters.description: Filter by parent program ID.

parameters.name: filter[status]
parameters.description: Filter by status. Supports multiple comma-separated values. Options: active, upcoming, past, ongoing, archived.

parameters.name: filter[query]
parameters.description: Search programs by name (partial match).

parameters.name: filter[with_participants]
parameters.description: Filter to only programs that have participants.

parameters.name: filter[can_register]
parameters.description: Filter to only programs the authenticated user can register for.

parameters.name: filter[upcoming]
parameters.description: Filter to only upcoming programs.

parameters.name: filter[past]
parameters.description: Filter to only past programs.

parameters.name: filter[archived_at]
parameters.description: Filter by archived status. Pass empty string to exclude archived programs.

parameters.name: filter[deleted_at]
parameters.description: Filter by deleted status. Pass empty string to exclude deleted programs.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include related resources (comma-separated). Options: signups, parentProgram, waitlistSignups, attendanceSheets.

parameters.name: append
parameters.description: Append computed attributes (comma-separated). Options: audience, signup_count.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort results by field. Prefix with - for descending. Options: id, registration_start_date, registration_end_date, event_start_date, event_end_date, created_at.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include related resources (comma-separated). Options: metadata, prices, prices.membership, prices.plan, prices.schedule_config, signups, parentProgram, waitlistSignups, attendanceSheets.

parameters.name: append
parameters.description: Append computed attributes (comma-separated). Options: signup_count.

attendance_sheet.description: The attendance sheet this record belongs to.

program_signup.description: The program signup (attendee) this record tracks.

registrationOpportunities.description: Registration opportunities this attendance sheet includes.

id.description: The unique identifier of the activity log entry.

request_hash.description: Unique request hash for tracing the request from API call to delivery.

message.description: Human-readable message describing the card delivery event.

delivered_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the card was delivered.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp of when the card was delivered.

user_id.description: The ID of the user who received the card.

member_id.description: The member ID of the user who received the card.

obfuscated_emails.description: Array of obfuscated email addresses where the card was sent.

emails_attempted.description: Array of obfuscated email addresses that failed to send.

failure_reason.description: Failure reason if status is failed.

error_message.description: Error message associated with the failure.

examples: Full access membership with all benefits included.

waivers.description: Waivers associated with this membership type.

plans.description: Plans associated with this membership type.

examples: Monthly membership plan with full access.

id.description: Unique identifier for the parent program.

title.description: Display name of the parent program shown to users.

description.description: Detailed description of the parent program, may contain HTML.
examples: A collection of exciting summer sports programs for all ages.

event_start_date.description: When the program's events begin. All child programs run within this window.

event_end_date.description: When the program's events end. All child programs run within this window.

registration_start_date.description: When registration opens for this program. Users cannot sign up before this date.

registration_end_date.description: When registration closes for this program. Users cannot sign up after this date.

ongoing.description: Whether this is an ongoing program with no fixed end date.

status.description: Current status of the program (e.g., active, archived, draft).

dates.description: Human-readable formatted event date range for display.

registration_dates.description: Human-readable formatted registration date range for display.

is_event.description: Whether this parent program represents a single event rather than a program series.

draft.description: Whether this program is in draft mode and not yet published.

is_hidden.description: Whether this program is hidden from public listings.

profile_image.description: URL to the program's profile/header image.

limit.description: Legacy capacity limit alias retained for compatibility with existing clients.

total_spots.description: Total number of signup spots across all registration opportunities.

available_spots.description: Number of remaining spots available to be claimed.

total_signups.description: Total active signups across child programs.

reserved_spots.description: Number of spots reserved by capped child programs.

reserved_spots_signups.description: Number of signups currently consuming reserved spots.

reserved_spots_remaining.description: Remaining reserved spots after reserved signups are counted.

uncapped_spots.description: Number of spots available to uncapped child programs.

uncapped_spots_signups.description: Number of signups currently consuming uncapped spots.

uncapped_spots_remaining.description: Remaining uncapped spots after uncapped signups are counted.

demographic.description: Audience demographic label for this parent program.

instructor.description: Instructor or facilitator name shown for this parent program.

location_name.description: Optional display name for the physical location.

location_address.description: Optional street address for the location.

location_latitude.description: Latitude for map display when a location is set.

location_longitude.description: Longitude for map display when a location is set.

is_online.description: Whether the program is delivered online.

readable_event_start_date.description: Human-readable event start date in tenant timezone.

readable_event_end_date.description: Human-readable event end date in tenant timezone.

event_start_time.description: Event start time in tenant timezone (24-hour HH:mm).

event_end_time.description: Event end time in tenant timezone (24-hour HH:mm).

registration_start_time.description: Registration open time in tenant timezone (24-hour HH:mm).

registration_end_time.description: Registration close time in tenant timezone (24-hour HH:mm).

display_only.description: Whether this parent program is display-only and not intended for signup.

unsplash_author_name.description: Unsplash credit author name for the selected profile image.

unsplash_author_link.description: Unsplash credit URL for the selected profile image author.

multiple_signups.description: Whether users may submit multiple signups for this parent program.

prompt_for_number_of_guests.description: Whether checkout prompts for number of guests.

prompt_for_registrant.description: Whether checkout prompts for registrant selection.

waitlist_enabled.description: Whether waitlist functionality is enabled for this parent program.

force_participant_selection.description: Whether participants must be selected before checkout.

show_participant_list.description: Whether participants can view the participant list for this parent program.

hide_participant_details.description: Whether enrollment counts, participant avatars, and spots remaining are hidden on the program page.

pay_by_cash.description: Whether this parent program allows cash payment option.

registration_fee.description: Registration fee amount in minor currency units (for example, cents).

cap_registration_fee.description: Whether registration fee is applied once per checkout instead of per signup.

ignores_tax_rates.description: Whether this parent program is configured to ignore tenant tax rates.

collection_additional_information.description: Whether additional signup form data should be collected.

require_emergency_contact_information.description: Whether emergency contact information is required at signup.

block_facility_calendars.description: Whether facility calendars should be blocked by this parent program.

auto_archive.description: Whether registration opportunities under this program are automatically archived after their event dates pass.

auto_archive_days.description: Number of days after event_end_date to wait before auto-archiving (0 = immediately).

form_id.description: Optional linked form identifier for additional questions.

allow_file_uploads.description: Whether registrants are allowed to upload files during signup.

file_uploads_required.description: Whether at least one file upload is required at signup.

file_uploads_max.description: Maximum number of files allowed per signup, or null for default behavior.

volunteer_opportunities_ids.description: Volunteer opportunity identifiers linked to this parent program.

facility_ids.description: Facility identifiers linked to this parent program.

sort_order.description: Display order for sorting in listings.

manual_order_enabled.description: Whether this item is pinned in the recommended sort order.

gl_code.description: GL code for accounting/financial reporting on program transactions.

updated_at.description: When this record was last updated.

deleted_at.description: When this record was soft deleted, null if not deleted.

archived_at.description: When this program was archived, null if not archived.

facilities.description: Facilities/locations where this program takes place.

registration_opportunities.description: Child programs available for registration under this parent program.

member_pricing_savings.description: Best currently available member pricing savings versus guest pricing.

volunteer_opportunities.description: Volunteer opportunities associated with this parent program.

waiver_assignments.description: Waiver assignments associated with this parent program.

guest.description: Guest associated with this signup (for non-member signups).

additional_member.description: Additional family member registered through this signup.

files.description: Files uploaded by the user as part of this signup.

form_submissions.description: Form submissions associated with this signup.

subscription_schedule.description: Recurring subscription schedule for this signup.

attendance_records.description: Attendance records for this signup across all dates.

list_of_activities.description: Comma-separated list of activities from the parent program.

examples: A fun week-long basketball camp for ages 8-12.

member_savings.description: Member discount savings compared to guest pricing.

price_for_user.description: Price for the currently authenticated user based on membership status.

num_signups_remaining_for_user.description: Number of signups remaining for the authenticated user (based on signup limits).

lowest_price_excluded.description: Lowest price available excluding special member pricing.

highest_price.description: Highest price tier available for this program.

signup_count.description: Total number of active signups for this program.

is_full.description: Whether the program has reached its capacity limit.

spots_remaining.description: Number of spots remaining before the program is full.

user_signup_count.description: Number of signups the authenticated user has for this program.

volunteer_price_is_free.description: Whether the program is free for volunteers.

price_id_for_user.description: Stripe price ID applicable for the authenticated user.

price_recurs_for_user.description: Whether the user's price is a recurring subscription.

price_interval_for_user.description: Billing interval for recurring prices (day, week, month, year).

price_interval_count_for_user.description: Number of intervals between each billing cycle.

can_user_purchase.description: Whether the authenticated user is eligible to purchase this program.

parent_program.description: Parent program this program belongs to.

prices.description: Pricing tiers available for this program.

waitlist_signups.description: Users on the waitlist for this program.

items.description: By default, all card types ['apple', 'google', 'pdf'] will be used if not specified.

user.description:
User specific data that will stored on the user profile and used to generate the card. If not supplied during
this request, the data stored on the user profile will be used.

unique_identifier_key.description:
The unique identifier key for the user. This is used to identify the user in the system.
In the example below, the unique identifier key is "MemberID".

data.description:
Additional metadata that can be included with the user data.
Example of metadata keys (all in CapitalCase):
```
"MemberID": "123456",
"Active": true,
"LastName": "Smith",
"FirstName": "John",
"MiddleName": "Andrew",
"ExpiryDate": "12/31/2025",
"PreferredEmail": "john@smith.com",
"MemberCardLastUpdatedDateTime": "06/03/2025",
"MemberType": "Active"
```

name.description: The full name of the user (generated from first/last name).

first_name.description: The first name of the user.

last_name.description: The last name of the user.

middle_name.description: The middle name of the user.

preferred_name.description: The preferred name of the user.

date_of_birth.description: The date of birth of the user.

email.description: A unique email address for the user.

profile_zip.description: The postal code or zip code of the user.

profile_state.description: The province or state of the user.

profile_address.description: The street address of the user.

profile_address_line_2.description: The second line of the address of the user.

profile_country.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the user.

telephone.description: A phone number for the user.

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
